name: uidepet-huellitassolidarias-api
description: API REST para UidePet - Huellitas Solidarias

scripts.db:schema: node --input-type=module -e "import 'dotenv/config';import fs from 'fs';import mysql from 'mysql2/promise';const c=await mysql.createConnection({host:process.env.DB_HOST||'localhost',port:Number(process.env.DB_PORT||3306),user:process.env.DB_USER||'root',password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD||'',multipleStatements:true});await c.query(fs.readFileSync('db/schema.sql','utf8'));await c.end();console.log('Schema OK');"
scripts.db:migrate: node --input-type=module -e "import 'dotenv/config';import fs from 'fs';import mysql from 'mysql2/promise';const c=await mysql.createConnection({host:process.env.DB_HOST||'localhost',port:Number(process.env.DB_PORT||3306),user:process.env.DB_USER||'root',password:process.env.DB_PASSWORD||'',database:process.env.DB_NAME||'huellitas_solidarias_db',multipleStatements:true});await c.query(fs.readFileSync('db/migrations/2026_07_19_integridad_y_backend_huellitas.sql','utf8'));await c.end();console.log('Migración OK');"
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:schema && npm run seed

author: Anyela Carpio
